creator: ntarmos@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
I'm afraid I do not understand the nature of this bug report. It is
filed as a compile error, yet there is no error output or other
information attached to the report. I also do not understand what the
submitter means by "not reflected well ... in SVN". Is this a bug of
conky at all or is this report against the ports svn repository?
